final_prompt.prompt:
Create a single large educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战), designed as a cartoon storybook illustration with clear title and bullet-pointed key facts.

Style/medium: children's educational infographic with the gentle watercolor warmth of storybook illustration, designed to unfold as a visual narrative
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, prominent title at top, main story illustration occupying the center, key learning points listed in a clean sidebar with clear punctuation
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story told through sequential cartoon scenes — Cao Cao's massive fleet, Zhuge Liang and Zhou Yu's alliance, the fire attack strategy, the burning ships, the defeat and retreat
Scene/backdrop: Yangtze River at dusk with wooden warships, fire and smoke rising, dramatic sky
Lighting/mood: the warm golden light of storytelling time, dramatic firelight illuminating faces, a sense of epic adventure made gentle for young minds
Color palette: warm amber and sunset orange for the fire and heroism, cool river blues for the water, gentle earth tones for the card background
Materials/textures: matte paper texture of a beloved children's book, soft watercolor washes with clear ink outlines
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战
Constraints: single-card format, all text legible for children ages 6-10, story beats clearly sequenced visually, key facts in bullet points with proper punctuation
Avoid: violent imagery unsuitable for children, dense text blocks, overly dark or scary tones, historical inaccuracy in major story beats
